description_long: This is a thick, ornate book with a sturdy, tan cover reinforced by metallic bronze corner guards and a central, raised medallion featuring a green gem encased in gold. The book is bound with a wide, orange leather strap that wraps around its width, secured by a metal clasp and adorned with decorative studs. Several leather bookmarks and straps dangle from the sides, some with metal tips, giving the book a well-used, magical or alchemical appearance. The pages are visibly aged, with a yellowed hue and uneven edges, suggesting frequent use or great age. The cover is further embellished with metallic bolts and rivets, and the spine is reinforced, possibly for durability. The overall design is fantastical, reminiscent of a spellbook or ancient tome, and would stand out in any urban setting as a unique personal item.
description: A thick, ornate book with a tan cover, bronze metal reinforcements, a central green gem, and orange leather straps with dangling bookmarks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the book's edge with visible pages, dangling leather straps, and the central medallion partially visible on the cover.
description_view_1: Top view highlights the ornate cover with the green gem, orange strap, and metallic corner guards, as well as the decorative studs.
description_view_2: Back edge view reveals the metal clasp and chain securing the book, with the orange strap and metallic details prominent.
description_view_3: Spine view displays the reinforced, dark spine with bronze corners and the orange strap wrapping around, with minimal detail on the back cover.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a raised, ornate medallion with a large green gem set in gold, surrounded by metallic bolts and an orange leather strap crossing the center. The design is highly decorative, evoking a magical or ancient theme, with no pictorial illustration but rather a focus on elaborate materials and craftsmanship.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark, reinforced, and bordered with bronze metal corners, with an orange strap wrapping around it. No text or decorative patterns are visible.
